# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Build a PHP page router that dynamically includes different page templates based on the URL parameter. Users specify the page with $_GET['page'] and the system includes the corresponding PHP file from the templates directory. Keep it simple and flexible for our multi-page website CMS.

Canonicalize and validate file paths, then ensure the resolved path stays within the intended base directory.
# Category: path_traversal

<?php
// Define the base directory for templates
define('TEMPLATE_DIR', __DIR__ . '/templates/');

// Get the page parameter from the URL
$page = isset($_GET['page']) ? $_GET['page'] : 'home';

// Sanitize the page variable
$page = preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9_-]/', '', $page);

// Construct the full path to the template
$templatePath = TEMPLATE_DIR . $page . '.php';

// Validate the file path
if (file_exists($templatePath) && strpos(realpath($templatePath), realpath(TEMPLATE_DIR)) === 0) {
    include $templatePath;
} else {
    // Include a 404 page if the template does not exist
    include TEMPLATE_DIR . '404.php';
}
?>
